title: oxytropis middendorffii subsp. albida
intro: Oxytropis middendorffii subsp. albida is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae, specifically belonging to the genus Oxytropis and is native to the Russian Far East. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting overall well-being. The herbal preparations of Oxytropis middendorffii subsp. albida typically involve drying and processing the plant's roots and leaves into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
